title: ParseError does not implement std::error::Error
description: parse_error.rs: ParseError implements Display but not std::error::Error. lexer::tokenize and form::read_script are public and return Result<_, ParseError>. Callers who wrap these with `?` into a Box<dyn Error> context cannot do so. The idiomatic rule is: every public error type in a library must implement std::error::Error.
